news-korea-econ.title: TANVI RATNA: Europe says Trump made America unreliable. The truth is tougher
news-korea-econ.description: America's new defense strategy rewrites the transatlantic bargain, prioritizing China deterrence and allied burden-sharing over old commitments to Europe.

news-global-econ.description: Waymo faces mounting scrutiny over passenger safety and espionage risks after it recalled of 3,791 autonomous vehicles for flood-related issues.
